hero.description: Stop losing leads to an invisible online presence. JLAW 360 builds the bridge between your product and your profit with cutting-edge funnels, bilingual SEO, and AI automations.

footer.description: The Canadian Productivity Gap Solution. We deploy AI agents, bilingual SEO architecture, and automated growth systems.
footer.cta_desc: Stop losing revenue to outdated systems. Get a visual breakdown of where your funnel is leaking.

about.description_1: Founded by Walkens, JLAW 360 was born out of frustration: too many agencies promise traffic, but none guarantee revenue. We are not ordinary web developers. We are conversion engineers.
about.description_2: We combine cutting-edge technical development (Next.js, React), artificial intelligence algorithms, and bilingual SEO expertise (EN/FR) to dominate local markets in Montreal and beyond.
about.difference_desc: Why our clients leave their old agencies for our technological infrastructures.

pillars.title: Data Transparency
pillars.description: No more reports about 'likes' and 'views'. We measure the ROAS (Return on Ad Spend) and the acquisition cost of each client.

pillars.title: Proprietary Technology
pillars.description: We build systems on React & Next.js, offering load speeds that destroy the competition and convert better.

pillars.title: Bilingual Domination
pillars.description: Our mastery of local SEO for French and English markets offers you maximum reach in Quebec and beyond.

services.subtitle: We don't just sell services. We build predictable client acquisition infrastructures to dominate your market.

services_list.title: Automated Lead Generation
services_list.description: We deploy acquisition funnels that filter, qualify, and convert your visitors into hot prospects in a fully automated way.

services_list.title: Meta & Google Ads
services_list.description: Algorithmic optimization of your ad budget to target clients ready to buy in your geographic area with laser precision.

services_list.title: Futuristic SEO & Local Presence
services_list.description: Dominate Google searches in your niche. We structure your site and Google My Business profile to be #1 in your region.

services_list.title: CRM Ecosystem & AI Chatbots
services_list.description: Stop losing sales. We integrate AI agents that answer 24/7 and qualify your leads directly into your calendar.

services.cta_subtitle: Book a complete audit of your current ecosystem (Value: $500 - Offered).
